questions.question: A member of the band No Doubt, this singer went solo in 2004.
In its third season, what TV drama features an actor playing real-life hotel tycoon Conrad 'Connie' Hilton?
What supercomputer defeated chess master Garry Kasparov?
Ron Swanson is Leslie Knope's mustachioed boss on what popular sitcom?
In a memorable gaffe, the late senator Ted Stevens famously referred to what technology as a 'series of tubes'?
